**Evaluating strike announcement**

I need to output JSON according to the strike_extraction schema. I'm looking at whether this document is an upcoming strike announcement. The title translates to, "Friday public transport regularly in service. National strike Usb postponed to October 9 - Roma Mobility Services." The content explains that on September 29, public transport will operate normally as the USB union has postponed the national strike to October 9. So, it's not an immediate strike announcement.
